# songgeneration-mcp

AI music generation server with 4 backends.

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) — full context
- [README.md](README.md) — quick start
- [docs/INSTALL.md](docs/INSTALL.md) — installation guide
- [docs/BACKENDS.md](docs/BACKENDS.md) — backend comparison

## Quick Start
```
uv sync && uv run uvicorn songgeneration_mcp.server:app --port 10885
curl http://127.0.0.1:10885/api/v1/generate -d '{"prompt":"tech house 128 BPM","duration":30}'
```
